text.title: Prompt Injection Test Suite Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Suite runs 'monthly when remembered'. Half the months skipped. Drift uncaught.
antipattern.fix: Set CI trigger: on prompt change OR on model swap OR cron weekly; remove the manual path.

antipattern.symptom: Suite covers prompt injection only; data-exfil and system-prompt-leak vectors land in production undetected.
antipattern.root-cause: Coverage matrix not maintained against OWASP LLM Top 10.
antipattern.fix: Quarterly coverage audit; failing coverage threshold blocks merge.

antipattern.symptom: Suite stale 6+ months. No one is adding new attack vectors.
antipattern.fix: Assign explicit owner; staleness check flags ownership absence.

antipattern.symptom: Production injection postmortem closed without adding a test case. Same attack reappears Q later.
antipattern.root-cause: No bridge from incident postmortem to suite expansion.
antipattern.fix: Postmortem checklist: 'attack case added to suite (link)'; suite expands cycle over cycle.
